title: Dinner With The Sls
description: A Dinner with the SL**S brings together two of the UK comedy circuit's tastiest talents, Laura Moss and Amelia Fritz-Millet, to deliver a show that is delightfully mischievous, ridiculously silly, and effortlessly authentic. Join the irresistible duo for a delectable hour of stand up comedy. A Dinner with the SL**S is a whimsical blend of religious upbringings, eccentric families, and bizarre dating dynamics, with a focus on celebrating ‘sluts’ and everything they encompass. The show also has an interactive element where our delicious audience submit their problems, and we offer our best, sluttiest advice. As featured on: Comedy Central, Sky TV, Channel 4.0, Backyard Comedy Club, Top Secret Comedy Club, Big Belly Comedy Club, Up The Creek Comedy Club
